name: Creamed Tomato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter and oil in a soup pot; add onions.
2. Sauté over low heat, sprinkling with thyme, basil, salt, and pepper; stir occasionally.
3. When onions are tender, stir in tomatoes and tomato paste; simmer about 18 minutes.
4. Blend flour with an equal amount of chicken broth; add to tomato mixture and mix well.
5. Slowly add the remaining chicken broth, stirring well. Simmer covered, over low heat, for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent soup from sticking to the bottom of the pan.
6. Put soup through a blender in small batches.
7. Reheat puree and stir in sugar, cream, and milk. Simmer a few minutes; add remaining butter just before serving.
